package.name: d1_sim
package.description:
AgiBot D1 Ultra Gazebo Classic simulation URDF stub.
TODO(agibot): Implement d1_sim.urdf.xacro following the same pattern as go2_sim/urdf/go2_sim.urdf.xacro: 1. Use the same frame names: base_footprint, base_link, lidar_link, imu_link 2. Adjust trunk dimensions and inertia to D1 Ultra specs 3. Replace l1_lidar_gazebo macro with D1's sensor macro (add to sensor_models/) or reuse l1_lidar_gazebo with D1 LiDAR parameters 4. Keep the libgazebo_ros_planar_move block unchanged 5. Zero changes required in robot_nav/ or robot_sim/
After implementing: ros2 launch robot_sim sim_bringup.launch.py robot:=d1
